userMessage: Set CH4 to 2V DC 1Mohm, trigger on CH4 rising at 1V normal mode, single acquisition

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built a server-side common TekAutomate flow.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Generated Flow","description":"Common TekAutomate scope flow built server-side.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"2","type":"write","label":"Configure CH4","params":{"command":"CH4:SCAle 2;CH4:COUPling DC;CH4:TERmination 1000000"}},{"id":"3","type":"group","label":"Configure trigger","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"3_1","type":"write","label":"Configure trigger (1/2)","params":{"command":"TRIGger:A:EDGE:SOUrce CH4;TRIGger:A:EDGE:SLOpe RISe;TRIGger:A:LEVel:CH4 1"}},{"id":"3_2","type":"write","label":"Configure trigger (2/2)","params":{"command":"TRIGger:A:MODe NORMal"}}]},{"id":"4","type":"write","label":"Configure acquisition/save","params":{"command":"ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence;ACQuire:STATE ON"}},{"id":"5","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]}}]}}]}
